title: psilocarya sellowiana
side_effects: Psilocarya sellowiana can have side effects if used improperly, such as increased heart rate, nausea, and vomiting. In addition, users may experience severe psychological distress, including anxiety, paranoia, and even psychosis in extreme cases. Other possible side effects include tremors, confusion, and in rare instances, a heightened risk of suicidal thoughts or behaviors. It is essential to note that the effects of Psilocarya sellowiana can vary greatly depending on factors such as dosage, individual tolerance, and the user's mental and physical health.
